title: Bungee Cord 1.8m, 1x Heavy Duty Elastic Cord with Metal Hooks, Max Load 30kg, Perfect for Securing Luggage, Camping, and Outdoor Activities
features: Heavy Duty and Durable: This Bungee Cord 1.8m is designed to handle heavy-duty tasks. Made from strong and hard-wearing elastic material, it provides a reliable and secure hold for securing luggage, tarps, and other outdoor equipment. The robust construction ensures that the cord can withstand wear and tear, making it perfect for demanding applications like camping, securing items in transport, and bundling gear.

Long 1.8m Length for Versatility: With a generous length of 1.8 meters, this bungee cord is perfect for a variety of uses. It’s long enough to secure larger items like outdoor gear, camping tents, and bulky luggage, providing extra stretch and flexibility. Whether you need to secure items to a vehicle or create a quick outdoor shelter, this bungee cord offers the length and strength required for a wide range of tasks.

Max Load 30kg for Superior Strength: The Bungee Cord 1.8m has a maximum load capacity of up to 30kg, making it perfect for heavy-duty applications. Whether you’re securing large camping equipment, luggage, or other outdoor items, this cord ensures that your gear stays securely in place. Its high load capability provides peace of mind, knowing your belongings are safe and stable during transportation or outdoor activities.

Bright Assorted Colours for Easy Identification: EYou will get 1x random colr bungee cord. The bright, vibrant colours make it easy to identify the right cord for the job, even in low light conditions. The colour coding helps you quickly grab the appropriate bungee cord based on your load requirements or the task at hand, providing a more organized and efficient solution for securing your belongings.

Compact and Convenient Packaging: The Bungee Cord 1.8m is packaged in a compact format, with dimensions of 24.8cm x 12cm x 3cm and a weight of 0.203kg. This makes it easy to store in your garage, car, or camping kit. The lightweight design ensures you can carry it with ease, while the compact packaging helps save space. Whether you’re traveling, camping, or simply organizing your home, this bungee cord is a versatile and convenient tool for your needs.
description: Bungee Cord 1.8m – Heavy Duty Elastic Cord for Outdoor and Household Use The Bungee Cord 1.8m is the ideal solution for securing heavy items during transport or outdoor activities. Made from durable elastic material and featuring sturdy metal hooks, this bungee cord is designed to provide maximum strength and reliability. With a generous length of 1.8 meters and a maximum load capacity of 30kg, it’s perfect for securing luggage, camping gear, or other bulky items. Heavy Duty and Durable Construction Designed to withstand tough conditions, the Bungee Cord 1.8m is made from strong and durable elastic material that provides a secure hold for all your needs. Whether you're using it to secure gear in your car, hold down a tarp during a camping trip, or bind large objects together, this cord can handle it all. The metal hooks are designed to be rust-resistant, ensuring long-lasting performance in various environments. Generous 1.8m Length for Versatile Applications One of the standout features of this bungee cord is its impressive length of 1.8 meters. This extended length provides you with more flexibility to secure large items or stretch across wider spaces. Whether you’re camping, traveling, or organizing your home, this bungee cord gives you the versatility to tackle a variety of tasks. It’s the perfect length for securing outdoor gear, luggage, or even tying down tarps in the backyard. Maximum Load Capacity of 30kg With a maximum load capacity of 30kg, this Bungee Cord is perfect for heavier items that require extra strength. From large camping equipment to heavy luggage, this bungee cord ensures that your items are securely fastened and won’t shift during transit. The high load capability makes it suitable for demanding outdoor tasks as well as everyday household use, giving you peace of mind knowing your gear is safe and secure. Bright Assorted Colours for Easy Identification The Bungee Cord 1.8m comes in three bright and vibrant colours: red, yellow, and blue. These easy-to-identify colours make it simple to grab the right cord for the right job. Whether you're working in low light conditions or just want to stay organized, the colour-coded cords allow for quick and convenient identification. This feature makes the Bungee Cord 1.8m not only practical but also visually appealing. Compact and Convenient for Easy Storage Despite its strength and length, the Bungee Cord 1.8m is compact and easy to store. The packaging dimensions of 24.8cm x 12cm x 3cm and a weight of just 0.203kg make it easy to store in your garage, car, or camping kit. The lightweight design makes it easy to carry around, and the convenient packaging ensures it won’t take up too much space. It’s perfect for travel, home organization, or any outdoor adventure where you need a reliable and durable bungee cord. Invest in the Bungee Cord 1.8m for a heavy-duty, reliable, and versatile solution to all your securing needs. Whether you're looking for a durable cord to hold down luggage during travel or need a reliable tool for outdoor activities, this bungee cord will provide the strength and flexibility you need. Its robust construction, maximum load capacity, and vibrant colour options make it the perfect choice for any project or activity.
